subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath been set ablaze with the fire of Thy love, who hath been drawn unto the breezes of Thy holiness, and who hath answered Thy call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک الذی اشتعل بنار محبتک و انجذب بنفحات قدسک و لبی لندائک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness, @love of God
